scripts.build: node scripts/validate-badges.mjs && node scripts/validate-pets.mjs && node scripts/validate-accessories.mjs && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-badges.mjs && node scripts/validate-pets.mjs && node scripts/validate-accessories.mjs
scripts.clear:pets: echo '[]' > src/data/pets.json && rm -f src/data/pets-progress.json && echo 'Cleared pets.json and progress'
scripts.clear:guests: echo '[]' > src/data/guests.json && rm -f src/data/guests-progress.json && echo 'Cleared guests.json and progress'
scripts.clear:all: npm run clear:pets && npm run clear:guests && echo 'All data cleared'
